description_long: This is a polygonal teapot with a faceted, octagonal body and a matching octagonal base and lid. The teapot is primarily off-white with a yellow-gold handle, base, and lid rim, giving it a distinctive two-tone appearance. The handle is thick, angular, and geometric, arching high above the lid and attached at two points on the upper body. The spout is short, straight, and projects outward from the body at a slight upward angle. The lid features a small central knob and a subtle blue and yellow geometric pattern. The overall design is modern and stylized, with clean lines and a sturdy, functional look.
description: A faceted, off-white teapot with a yellow-gold angular handle, base, and lid, featuring a short straight spout and a patterned lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout on the left, the octagonal handle, and the patterned lid with central knob.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, no spout visible, highlighting the teapot's faceted body and base.
description_view_2: Rear view with the spout on the right, handle arching above, and the patterned lid visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the handle attachment and the back of the teapot, with the spout not visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: Short, straight spout angled slightly upward, positioned on the front side of the body.
attribute_handle_design: Thick, angular, octagonal loop handle arching above the lid, attached at two upper points on the body.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; flat octagonal lid with a small central knob and snug fit.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Geometric blue and yellow pattern on the lid surface.
